description_long: This is a single bed with a robust wooden frame, featuring a rectangular shape and a simple, rustic design. The headboard and footboard are both solid and flat, constructed from the same wood as the side rails, giving the bed a cohesive appearance. The sleeping surface is covered with a light-colored, textured material that appears to be a bare mattress or tightly fitted sheet. The frame sits low to the ground, with visible slats or supports beneath the mattress area, suggesting durability and stability. The wood has a matte, slightly rough finish, with natural grain patterns visible throughout. This bed would be suitable for utilitarian or minimalist urban environments, such as hostels, shelters, or temporary accommodations.
description: A rustic, single wooden bed with a solid headboard and footboard, featuring a bare mattress and a sturdy, low-profile frame.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid headboard, side rails, and the full length of the mattress surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the low profile of the bed, the thickness of the frame, and the visible support slats underneath.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid footboard and the end of the mattress, with the frame's wood grain clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the side rail and support structure beneath the mattress.
